# pip-audit CVE ignore list — one ID per line. Lines starting with # are
# comments. Reviewed quarterly; entries should have a TODO and rationale.

# transformers 4.53.0 — only fix is in 5.0.0rc3 (release candidate, not
# stable). Re-evaluate when transformers 5.x ships a stable release. Our
# deployment only loads our own trained checkpoints from a private GCS
# bucket, so the untrusted-model-loading exposure is low.
